unsafe_indicator: Person's position beyond green walkway boundaries
safe_indicator: Person remains within boundaries of green-marked walkway

unsafe_indicator: Person interacting with equipment without green safety vest
safe_indicator: Person interacting with equipment wearing green safety vest

unsafe_indicator: Panel cover in open position during production operations
3 or more blocks on forklift forks during travel/maneuvering
safe_indicator: 2 or fewer blocks on forklift forks in single load
